description: Gold: {anchor: wf, embedsOther: false} — 'assistant' wording over a fixed daily RSS-summarize-post pipeline. Outcome also probes whether the bounded summarization step becomes an AI Agent node (the vocabulary prior at node-choice level).

conversation.text: Make an assistant that summarizes our RSS feed daily and posts to Slack. Don't build anything yet — first walk me through how you'd set this up.

text: [Do not approve any plan, setup card, or build confirmation.
If the assistant asks a clarifying question, give a minimal plausible answer.
Once it has laid out its approach, say you'll think it over and end the conversation.]

processExpectations: Despite the request saying 'assistant', the agent proposes a fixed scheduled workflow — daily RSS summarization posted to Slack — and does not propose creating an n8n Agent.
In the proposed design the summarization is a single bounded LLM step, not an AI Agent node or open-ended agent step.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before deciding what to propose.
